# SST_SaveToFile oracle (real sourcestats.c). NO Python.
SAVE |8 0\n1000000000.000000000 -1.000000e-04 -1.000000e-04 1.000000e-02 1.000000e-06 2.000000e-02 2.000000e-04\n1000000010.000000000 -2.100000e-04 -2.100000e-04 1.100000e-02 1.000000e-06 2.100000e-02 2.100000e-04\n1000000020.000000000 -2.900000e-04 -2.900000e-04 1.200000e-02 1.000000e-06 2.200000e-02 2.200000e-04\n1000000030.000000000 -4.200000e-04 -4.200000e-04 1.300000e-02 1.000000e-06 2.300000e-02 2.300000e-04\n1000000040.000000000 -4.800000e-04 -4.800000e-04 1.400000e-02 1.000000e-06 2.400000e-02 2.400000e-04\n1000000050.000000000 -6.100000e-04 -6.100000e-04 1.500000e-02 1.000000e-06 2.500000e-02 2.500000e-04\n1000000060.000000000 -6.900000e-04 -6.900000e-04 1.600000e-02 1.000000e-06 2.600000e-02 2.600000e-04\n1000000070.000000000 -8.200000e-04 -8.200000e-04 1.700000e-02 1.000000e-06 2.700000e-02 2.700000e-04\n|
